meaning: adj.电报机的,电信的,电报的,(目光,手势等)暗示的
examples: You will need to arrange a telegraphic transfer from your bank to ours.
His already terse prose had become even tighter, more telegraphic.
Back then, it was the telephone, high-speed rotary presses, stereotyping, typesetting machines, color presses, rotogravure and the electric-telegraphic typewriter.
The Jewish Telegraphic Agency (JTA), Jewish Talk Radio, and the Christian Broadcasting Network also saw value in covering it.
